name: ViewSonic VX2730D-4K 27" Switchable Refresh Rate Gaming Monitor - 3840x2160 - 288Hz@FHD & 144Hz@4K - 0.5ms MPRT - AMD FreeSync Premium - NVIDIA G-Sync Compatible - Dedicated 24.5" eSports OSD Setting - 2x HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort - Internal 2W Speakers
shortName: ViewSonic VX2730D-4K 27" Switchable Refresh Rate Gaming Monitor
description: 27-inch 4K gaming monitor with switchable refresh rates up to 288Hz at FHD and 144Hz at 4K, featuring AMD FreeSync Premium and NVIDIA G-Sync compatibility.
